case_title: SHEILA KHAN VARIBA VS. PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-06-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUN-22-2007 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
